title: ornithopus compressus
intro: Ornithopus compressus, also known as bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its small yellow flowers and trifoliate leaves. The medicinal properties of Ornithopus compressus include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Ornithopus compressus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, and is also used in herbal remedies for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
